name: @lolly/engine
description: Platform-agnostic engine for Lolly. Loads tool manifests, renders inputs, hydrates templates, drives exports through the capability bridge.
//sideEffects: The engine is pure — every module only defines/exports; none patch globals or run required top-level effects. Declaring this lets the bundler tree-shake the barrel (src/index.ts) so importing e.g. `parseUrlState` no longer drags createRuntime→Handlebars and loadTool→Ajv onto the web shell's boot chunk. See plans/ui-perf-audit.md.
//: The engine has NO direct dependency on a DOM library, framework, or storage backend. Those are provided by the host shell at runtime via the capability bridge.
